summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 4 upgrade features. All 17 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly. The massive 4-phase upgrade (core engine, news engine, scheduler safety, frontend dashboard) is fully functional.

critical_code_review_comments: Phase 4 upgrade successfully implements all 4 phases: core engine upgrades, news engine overhaul, scheduler safety upgrades, and frontend dashboard
Dynamic confidence thresholds correctly adjust based on market regime (DT:78, LT:65 in NEUTRAL BEARISH regime)
Risk mode correctly shows CAUTIOUS when market is NEUTRAL BEARISH
Pipeline funnel correctly tracks 7 stages with bottleneck detection
News engine correctly processes 80+ articles with multi-layer filtering (relevance, dedup, signal extraction)
Catalyst scoring 0-100 with trade categories (HOT/BULLISH/BEARISH/WATCHLIST/IGNORE) working correctly
News velocity detection shows 24h/4h article counts, sources, trend, and score
Scheduler safety upgrades: max_consecutive_losses=2 (changed from 3), post_cooldown_threshold_boost=5
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None required - using live market data from financial APIs and GPT-5.2 for AI analysis
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 upgrade fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Auto Trade page shows PAPER badge, CAUTIOUS risk mode badge, NEUTRAL BEARISH regime badge. 2) Market Condition Adjustment Active banner appears when risk mode is not NORMAL. 3) Dashboard strip shows Dynamic Thresholds (DT:78, LT:65). 4) Active Risk Limits row shows all 7 columns including Cooldown 2 losses/30m. 5) Diagnostics tab shows Trade Pipeline Funnel with 7 stages, Bottleneck badge, Top Rejection Reasons, Dynamic Threshold Adjustments. 6) News page analyze NVDA shows catalyst_score 51, WATCHLIST category, LOW Impact, trade_description, Filter Pipeline stats, Velocity Details. 7) Scheduler settings confirm max_consecutive_losses=2 and post_cooldown_threshold_boost=5.

nvda_analysis.filter_pipeline: 80 Ingested → 31 Relevant → 30 Unique → 29 High Signal → 1 Filler
nvda_analysis.velocity_details: 0 24h Articles, 0 4h Articles, 13 Sources, Decelerating Trend, 30/100 Score

catalyst_analysis.label: WEAK_NOISE
catalyst_analysis.trade_logic: Multiple partnership/read-through positives but no high-impact NVDA-specific catalyst

backend_apis.news_analyze: Returns catalyst_score, category, trade_impact, news_velocity, velocity_details, filter_stats, trade_description
backend_apis.scheduler_status: Returns post_cooldown_active, daily_loss_pct_of_max, settings with max_consecutive_losses=2
